name: multiple-share-scope
description: Module Federation example demonstrating multiple share scopes to run React 17 and React 18 simultaneously.

scripts.start: concurrently "cd ./host && pnpm dev" "cd ./provider-react-17 && pnpm dev" "cd ./provider-react-18 && pnpm dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd ./host && pnpm build" "cd ./provider-react-17 && pnpm build" "cd ./provider-react-18 && pnpm build"
scripts.serve: concurrently "cd ./host && pnpm serve" "cd ./provider-react-17 && pnpm serve" "cd ./provider-react-18 && pnpm serve"
scripts.clean: concurrently "cd ./host && pnpm clean" "cd ./provider-react-17 && pnpm clean" "cd ./provider-react-18 && pnpm clean"
scripts.e2e:ci: pnpm run build && echo "No e2e tests yet"
